name: mp4_bypass_requeue
drl:
rule G0 salience 5 when T1(f0 == "seed") then drools.setFocus("g"); end
rule A when T1(f0 contains "zz", $x : f2) then end
rule B when $p : T1(f2 == false) then drools.setFocus("g"); modify($p) { setF2(true) } end
rule C agenda-group "g" when T1(f0 == "k1", $af0 : f0) T1(f0 == "k2", f0 == $af0) then end
